name: Jamie (Yi-Chieh) Cheng
headline: Organizational Development & Program Management | Data- & Improvement-driven Strategy | M.S. Applied Org Psychology
about:
About
About
How can we make the workplace better for its people? This question has been the driving force behind my career journey thus far, continuously fueling my passion wherever I go.

My introduction to HR sparked a deep interest in applying psychology to organizations and led me to pursue an MS in Applied Organizational Psychology at USC. Combining my academic background in Psychology and Business with professional experiences in HR, HRBP, Organizational Development (OD), and employee experience, I've become a firm advocate for leveraging psychological methodologies to enhance workplace environments.

Across diverse industries, from startups to multinational corporations in fintech, healthcare, renewable energy, and education, I have enjoyed creating measurable impacts by transforming data into actionable insights and strategies for organizational growth and efficacy. My favorite work project so far? It’s hard to pick, but I would say it's an OD project where I crafted narratives from employee feedback survey data to inform executive-level strategic planning initiatives!

Outside of work, I enjoy traveling and meeting people from various backgrounds. While Taiwan holds my heart as my homeland, I've had the privilege of calling 8 countries across Asia, North America, Europe, and West Africa "home" over the past 8 years.

That being said, I welcome new connections here on LinkedIn! Let's schedule a Zoom call (with the occasional cameo from my two lovely cats) to exchange insights and experiences. I hope to learn more about your career journey and share mine in return!
